title: Credential

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

provider.description: The provider whose vault holds the referenced secret.

vaultId.description: Reference into the provider's own secret vault. The secret itself is never stored here.

mcpServerUrl.description: URL of the MCP server this Credential is matched to at session creation.

scope.description: The generalized-ownership attachment point this Credential is pinned to.

onBehalfOf.description: If present, restricts this Credential to use on behalf of this specific Principal.

description: A provider-side vault reference, scope-pinned and matched to MCP servers by URL.

Provider.description: Agent-hosting provider. `anthropic` is the reference adapter; `openai` and `google` are reserved by name for future adapters.

level.description: Which level of the tenant/workspace/user/group/role taxonomy this attachment point is at.

id.description: Identifier of the scoped entity (the tenant id, workspace id, user id, group id, or role id).

Scope.description: A generalized-ownership attachment point: a taxonomy level plus the identifier at that level.

kind.description: The kind of principal being referenced.

id.description: Identifier of the referenced Principal resource.

PrincipalRef.description: A pointer to a Principal by kind and id, without embedding its full claims-contract record.

PrincipalKind.description: The kind of acting party: a human user, a machine-to-machine service, or an agent acting on its own.
